soft.short: The wrapper has no metadata, but you may continue.
soft.long: The wrapper you provided does not map to any known metadata. The request can continue, but the result may be incomplete.

hard.long: The wrapper you provided does not map to any known metadata, so I cannot continue with this request.

soft.short: This wrapper is deprecated, but you may continue.
soft.long: The wrapper you provided is recognized but marked as deprecated. You may continue, though the result may rely on older or less-preferred       metadata.

hard.long: The wrapper you provided is marked as deprecated and cannot be used for this request.
